views.title: Browser proof surfaces
views.description: Live UI and browser-test tasks for chat, trace, graph, notebook, upload, and room flows.
views.query: browser chat trace graph notebook upload room

sampleTasks.title: Open room → #rooms/expositio-pulse mounts the public room page; back; Subscribe opens the modal
frame, five tabs, proof footer, read-only hint — and no Ops tab without ops=1
each tab swaps the main surface content
ops=1 in the hash query reveals the Ops tab and the ops panel
#/rooms/<slug> variant resolves to the same page
unknown slug renders an honest missing state, never relabeled demo data
tabs, proof link, and paper filters are keyboard-accessible
mobile room chrome stays clickable without clipped controls or trace overlap
subscribe button opens the modal; Escape closes it (no undismissable chrome)
scrim click also closes the modal
memory-mode subscribe is honest: success state carries the demo hint
invalid email is rejected inline, not silently accepted
BankerToolBench fresh-room contract: upload task inputs -> @nodeagent -> package verifier
real-app preview — Room NodeAgent fills the variance column (lock → CAS → release)
real-app preview — GTM research enrichment (source-backed CellPayload)
real-app preview — @nodeagent reconcile drives the sheet through chat (chat + sheet framing)
real-app preview — review mode: agent edits arrive as proposals, host approves
send renders an instant, stably-keyed, confirmed bubble
editing own message paints the new text in place
can send an artifact reference without extra text
chat artifact references open beside the primary work surface on desktop
mobile chat artifact references switch back to the work surface
dropping a file into chat uploads it and attaches a reference
paperclip upload attaches a file reference from the composer
pasting a file into the composer uploads it as a reference

views.title: Public Node repo proofs
views.description: Cross-repo proof tasks for NodeAgent, NodeMem, NodeTrace, NodeRL, NodeSEO, and NodeGraph integrations.
views.query: NodeAgent NodeMem NodeTrace NodeRL NodeSEO NodeGraph storyboard proof capture smoke

sampleTasks.title: Prove the assistant-ui chat scaffold keeps NodeAgent tool surfaces visible.
Create a public NodeRL episode storyboard from trace to reward to memory to repair to export.
Generate a Search Console report without scraping rankings or simulating clicks.
Run the standalone NodeTrace capture-plan smoke without requiring a sibling NodeRoom checkout.
Verify the portable NodeAgent frame spine without provider keys.
Verify NodeMem passive scan, dedupe, dismissal learning, and policy gates.
Use NodeGraph to show trace causality across UI surface, runtime event, proof card, source file, screenshot, and receipt.
Regenerate the NodeTrace walkthrough media from storyboard-governed screenshots.
Generate the NodeTrace Trace Coach SQLite proof from live NodeRoom source or embedded snapshots.
Regenerate the NodeAgent storyboard proof clip and bind it to smoke receipts.
Validate the NodeMem README media as an explicit storyboard proof receipt.
Capture a landing/search-origin journey and pass review media to Gemini visual QA.
Design the NodeGraph memory-cluster view for NodeMem suggestions and dismissals.
Verify NodeRL reward, memory, and dataset-export boundaries for one benchmark-style task.
Run the NodeSEO static audit under the storyboard proof contract.
